stemHtml: The centre of pressure of your wing moves. Which statement is correct?

options.a: Movement of the centre of pressure affects pitch moment, but does not cause stabiliser movement.
options.b: The centre of pressure moving does not cause a pitch moment, even if the pilot doesn't correct.
options.c: Movement of the centre of pressure affects pitch moment and stabiliser movement.
options.d: Only movement of the centre of gravity affects stabiliser movement.
